subject: Your API latency is costing you enterprise deals
body:
Hi [Name],

Tested your public API yesterday — p99 latency is around 800ms. That's a red flag for enterprise procurement teams who run technical due diligence.

We've seen FinTech companies lose 30–40% of enterprise pipeline at the technical review stage due to infrastructure concerns — not product quality.

[Product] helps you optimize API performance and generate the technical documentation enterprise buyers expect. Two clients closed their first $100K+ deals within 90 days of implementation.

Happy to share a technical breakdown — interested?
why_it_works: specific technical finding + enterprise-stage pain + social proof with numbers + peer-level tone
